title: Business Analyst I
description: We're hiring a Business Analyst I at GE Aerospace. This is an exciting opportunity to join our engineering-first, mission-critical, established team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 2-4 years years of experience and are passionate about Aerospace, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Contribute to team projects and strategic initiatives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables
Support management with analysis and reporting
Identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities
Participate in professional development and training activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or related field
